title: Liquefied Natural Gas
content:
## Liquefied Natural Gas
From coast to coast and around the world, our LNG experts have advised on some of the most significant and complex LNG projects in Canada and internationally, enabling us to stay on top of this ever-changing industry and design proactive and results-oriented solutions.
We leverage our extensive cross-border experience and insight to craft unique strategies that move LNG facilities, pipelines and projects forward.
Integrating complementary practitioners and industry leaders across offices, we field the best prepared, most collaborative and most nimble teams. Our across-the-board coverage encompasses all aspects of the LNG value chain from structuring and negotiating international joint ventures and partnerships, to the acquisition, development and financings through to ongoing operations.
Moving LNG projects forward inevitably gives rise to the need for multi-faceted regulatory expertise. Working closely with our environmental and Indigenous lawyers we cut through the complex maze of obtaining permits, authorizations and approvals, including environmental assessments and permitting, regulatory assessment processes, consultations, negotiations and agreements with First Nations.
We are truly a one-stop shop. Collaborate with us to pioneer a new project or propel an existing one forward.

### A selection of our projects
Specific projects we have championed include:
- TMPL Expansion Project
